description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, oval-shaped carapace with a slightly rough, matte texture. The crab has two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae) at the front, with one claw noticeably larger than the other, and four pairs of segmented walking legs extending from the sides. The coloration is a mix of sandy beige and light brown, with subtle darker mottling on the carapace and legs. The underside and joints of the legs show a lighter, almost off-white hue. The eyes are not distinctly visible, and no antennae are apparent in the images.
description: A sandy beige crab with a broad carapace, two large claws, and eight segmented legs, featuring a rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both claws raised and the full width of the carapace, with all legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the claws and the segmentation of the legs, with one claw more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the carapace and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the curvature of the claws and the articulation of the legs.
